title: Create src/core/logger.ts - extract logger from index.ts
description: Extract createLogger function, SERVICE_NAME constant, and Logger type to dedicated module

title: Update src/kb/commands.ts - import types from types.ts
description: Remove CommandDef interface definition, import it from ./types instead. Keep loadCommands function unchanged.

title: Update src/kb/agents.ts - import types from types.ts
description: Remove AgentDef interface definition, import it from ./types instead. Keep loadAgents function unchanged.

title: Add zod dependency for config validation
description: Add zod to package.json dependencies for schema validation of coder.json config file

title: Test and verify refactored plugin works
description: Run bun run build and bun run mtest to verify the refactored plugin loads correctly. Test both active:true and active:false scenarios.

title: Create src/kb/commands.ts - extract command loading logic
description: Extract CommandDef interface and loadCommands function. Import parseFrontmatter from parser.ts and Logger type from core.

title: Create src/kb/service.ts - KnowledgeBaseService class
description: Create KnowledgeBaseService class with constructor taking {coderConfig, logger}. Implement async apply(config) method that: checks active flag, loads commands/agents if active, mutates config. Returns Promise<void>.

title: Create src/core/index.ts - re-export core modules
description: Create barrel export file that re-exports createLogger, Logger, loadConfig, CoderConfig from core modules

title: Refactor src/index.ts - use new module structure
description: Refactor main entry point to import from core and kb modules. Implement active flag logic: if active=false, still create logger but skip loading/registering commands and agents. Return minimal config() callback when disabled.

title: Create src/kb/types.ts - shared type definitions
description: Extract CommandDef, AgentDef interfaces from commands.ts and agents.ts into a shared types.ts file. Add new KnowledgeBase interface that contains commands and agents arrays.

title: Refactor plugin: split index.ts into logical modules (core, kb, config)
Simplify src/index.ts - use KnowledgeBaseService
description: Replace direct loadCommands/loadAgents calls with KnowledgeBaseService. Remove active flag check (handled by service). Result should be ~15 lines: create logger, load config, create service, return config hook that calls service.apply().

title: Create manual-test/.coder/coder.json - sample config for testing
description: Create sample config file in manual-test folder with active:true for testing the plugin config loading

title: Create src/kb/agents.ts - extract agent loading logic
description: Extract AgentDef interface and loadAgents function. Import parseFrontmatter from parser.ts and Logger type from core.

title: Create src/kb/index.ts - re-export kb modules
description: Create barrel export file that re-exports CommandDef, AgentDef, loadCommands, loadAgents, parseFrontmatter from kb modules

title: Update src/kb/index.ts - export service and types
description: Update barrel exports to include KnowledgeBaseService, KnowledgeBaseServiceOptions, KnowledgeBase, CommandDef, AgentDef. Keep existing exports for loadCommands, loadAgents, parseFrontmatter.

title: Create src/core/config.ts - config loading with zod validation
description: Create config module that loads .coder/coder.json from user's working directory (process.cwd()). Use zod for validation. Default to active:true when file missing. CoderConfig interface with active:boolean field.

title: Create src/kb/parser.ts - extract frontmatter parser
description: Extract parseFrontmatter function to dedicated module. Pure utility with no external dependencies.

title: Test and verify KnowledgeBaseService refactor
description: Run typecheck and build. Test with manual-test using both active:true and active:false configurations to verify behavior.

title: Test beads integration
Refactor kb package to service-based architecture with KnowledgeBaseService
description: Follow-up to oc-dmd (initial module split). Refactor the kb package from plain functions to a service-based architecture. Create KnowledgeBaseService class with a single apply() method that: 1) checks coderConfig.active flag, 2) if inactive, logs and returns early, 3) if active, loads commands/agents from disk and mutates the OpenCode config. This simplifies src/index.ts to just create the service and call apply().
